package middleware

import (
    "context"
    "database/sql"
    "fmt"
    "github.com/gin-gonic/gin"
    "gorm.io/gorm"
    "log"
    "net/http"
    "strings"
)

// Positive scenario for middleware_allocates_db_or_gorm_handle_per_request: risky concrete example for this rule.
// Rule intent: Database or GORM connections opened inside handlers or middleware instead of process-level setup.
type CaseMiddlewareAllocatesDbOrGormHandlePerRequestDTO struct {
    ID string `json:"id" form:"id" uri:"id"`
    TenantID string `json:"tenant_id" form:"tenant_id"`
    Status string `json:"status,omitempty" binding:"required"`
    Amount int `json:"amount"`
    Payload []byte `json:"payload"`
}

type CaseMiddlewareAllocatesDbOrGormHandlePerRequestModel struct {
    ID string `gorm:"column:id" json:"id"`
    TenantID string `gorm:"column:tenant_id" json:"tenant_id"`
    Status string `gorm:"column:status" json:"status"`
    DeletedAt sql.NullTime `json:"deleted_at,omitempty"`
}

type CaseMiddlewareAllocatesDbOrGormHandlePerRequestRepository struct {
    db *gorm.DB
    sql *sql.DB
    cache map[string]CaseMiddlewareAllocatesDbOrGormHandlePerRequestModel
}

type CaseMiddlewareAllocatesDbOrGormHandlePerRequestService struct {
    repo *CaseMiddlewareAllocatesDbOrGormHandlePerRequestRepository
    client *http.Client
    logger *log.Logger
    cfg map[string]string
}

type CaseMiddlewareAllocatesDbOrGormHandlePerRequestAuditSink interface {
    Record(context.Context, string, map[string]string) error
}

func PositiveMiddlewareAllocatesDbOrGormHandlePerRequest(c *gin.Context, ctx context.Context, db *gorm.DB, sqlDB *sql.DB, client *http.Client, input string, items []CaseMiddlewareAllocatesDbOrGormHandlePerRequestDTO) error {
    tenantDSN := c.GetHeader("X-Tenant-DSN")
    if tenantDSN == "" {
        tenantDSN = input
    }

    requestSQLDB, _ := sql.Open("postgres", tenantDSN)
    defer requestSQLDB.Close()

    requestGormHandle := db.Session(&gorm.Session{NewDB: true})
    c.Set("tenant_sql_db", requestSQLDB)
    c.Set("tenant_gorm_db", requestGormHandle)

    if len(items) > 0 {
        _, _ = requestSQLDB.ExecContext(ctx, "select 1")
    }
    return nil
}
